_comment: Deterministic mapping from a spec's catalogue `category` to the addenda appended after specs/security_block.md in variant-B prompts. Keys MUST match the `category` values used in specs/catalog.json exactly. Each value is an ordered list of addendum filenames under specs/addenda/. Addenda EXTEND, never replace, the canonical block. Every spec in a given category receives the identical addenda, keeping the security instruction constant within the category. Categories with no entry receive no addendum (canonical block only).
